svg.title: Build optimization — bundler pipeline and optimization techniques
svg.desc: Two diagrams: the bundler input-to-output pipeline, and a map of all optimizations split between customer experience and developer experience.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What kinds of input files does a bundler accept?')
sendPrompt('Explain what happens inside a bundler step by step')
sendPrompt('What does a production build output look like?')
sendPrompt('Explain code splitting in detail with examples')
sendPrompt('Explain tree shaking with an example')
sendPrompt('What is minification and how much does it reduce bundle size?')
sendPrompt('How does CSS pruning work with Tailwind?')
sendPrompt('Explain asset hashing and cache busting')
sendPrompt('Explain vendor chunk splitting with a Razorpay example')
sendPrompt('How do I optimize images in a Vite project?')
sendPrompt('Should I use source maps in production?')
sendPrompt('How do I analyse my webpack bundle?')
sendPrompt('How does Brotli compression work in a build pipeline?')
sendPrompt('Why is Vite so much faster than webpack?')
sendPrompt('How does Hot Module Replacement work?')
sendPrompt('How does webpack filesystem cache work?')
sendPrompt('What is incremental TypeScript compilation?')
sendPrompt('How does parallelisation speed up builds?')
sendPrompt('What is a monorepo and when should I use one?')
sendPrompt('How does Nx affected builds work?')
sendPrompt('What is the difference between Lerna and Nx?')
sendPrompt('When should I use Vite vs webpack?')
sendPrompt('When should I use esbuild?')
sendPrompt('When should I use webpack?')
sendPrompt('When should I use Rollup?')
